title: Prospect wants clarity before outcome promises
summary: A prospect says they need clarity before promises about growth because vague positioning makes the offer feel risky.
verbatim_quotes: "If I still do not understand the service after the hero, I will not book a call."
quotes: "If I still do not understand the service after the hero, I will not book a call."
observations: Clarity is a prerequisite for action.
